caption: An elderly man with glasses and a light-colored patterned button-down shirt stands behind a wooden podium, speaking into a microphone. He is holding a piece of paper and looking down at it as he speaks. The setting is an indoor room with brown wooden blinds in the background and a dark speaker to the left. A small sign is mounted on the wall to the left of the man. In the foreground, the backs of several people's heads are visible, suggesting an audience. The podium features a logo with a red emblem and the word "ORCA" appears as a white text overlay on the right side of the scene. Across the sequence of frames, the man remains in the same position, making slight movements with his head and hands as he continues to read from his paper, while the audience members in the foreground remain relatively still.
